message:
Update hook to handle new SelectionResponse with graceful local fallback

Updates the hook to consume the new structured SelectionResponse, enabling
informative fallback messages when no remote worker is available.

Changes to process_hook():
- Handle response.worker == None case explicitly
- Log specific reason from response.reason when falling back to local
- Use emoji warning (⚠️) for visibility in agent output
- Pass &SelectedWorker to execute_remote_compilation (not full response)

Changes to helper functions:
- Rename selection_to_worker_config → selected_worker_to_config
- Update execute_remote_compilation to take &SelectedWorker directly

Test updates:
- Update all tests to construct SelectionResponse with new structure:
  - worker: Some(SelectedWorker{...})
  - reason: SelectionReason::Success
- Add SelectionReason import to test module
- Update assertions to unwrap worker Option before field access
- Rename test_worker_config_from_selection → test_worker_config_from_selected_worker

All 43 rch tests pass.

Part of: remote_compilation_helper-4ur (Add reason field for no-worker cases)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
